nodes.label: AI for keyword research: low-hanging fruit vs long-tail
nodes.grounding_span: I often use AI to help me with research, either by giving it the topic and asking it to provide the information I need or by dumping a bunch of my own research and asking the AI to organize it for me

nodes.label: AI as brainstorming and idea generator
nodes.grounding_span: It helps me brainstorm ideas for new plots or characters or names. It also helps me with sentence structure

nodes.label: AI reliability for practical tasks
nodes.grounding_span: Half the items it suggested I look into turned out to be non-existent

nodes.label: AI as supplement to creative process
nodes.label_negative: AI as replacement for human creativity
nodes.grounding_span: AI is a tool and it's not meant to be a replacement for human creativity. It's meant to take on the more routine and mundane tasks

nodes.label: AI impact on skill maintenance
nodes.label_negative: Over-reliance on AI leading to skill atrophy
nodes.grounding_span: It's important to me to maintain that skillset, so sometimes I even do it myself if it's a challenging project

nodes.label: AI stigma in workplace culture
nodes.label_negative: Open acceptance of AI in self-publishing
nodes.grounding_span: there is, however, a massive trend against using AI in the indie/self-publishing industry, so I'm very quiet about my usage of it online

nodes.label: Productivity and efficiency
nodes.grounding_span: AI helps me fit things like that into my articles in a natural sounding way and also checks for keyword stuffing for me

nodes.label: Creative autonomy
nodes.grounding_span: I want to make sure I don't lose my skillset

nodes.label: Professional reputation and social acceptance
nodes.grounding_span: Anyone who is 'caught' using AI in the indie world gets flamed online, which can destroy a new author's career

nodes.label: Satisfaction with AI as a helpful tool
nodes.grounding_span: AI helps me fit things like that into my articles in a natural sounding way

nodes.label: Frustration with AI hallucination
nodes.grounding_span: Half the items it suggested I look into turned out to be non-existent

nodes.label: Intentional skill maintenance
nodes.grounding_span: I'll take a break and do it myself for a few days to make sure I'm keeping up on my creativity

nodes.label: Discretion about AI use due to stigma
nodes.grounding_span: I just never mention it or involve myself in conversations relating to AI

nodes.label: Belief in AI as tool not replacement
nodes.grounding_span: AI is a tool and it's not meant to be a replacement for human creativity

nodes.label: Mood-dependent task delegation
nodes.grounding_span: Often, it depends more on mood than pure logic

nodes.label: Deliberate skill preservation through manual practice
nodes.grounding_span: If I've been delegating that task to AI for a straight week, I'll take a break and do it myself for a few days
